summary: Built a weekday-focused paid media launch plan with a testing matrix, pacing rules, UTMs, and Day 7/Day 14 decision gates. Excluded peak-hour overdelivery and added compliance/brand safety checks.

artifacts.notes: Includes architecture, pacing, and risk checklist.

decisionsNeeded.decision: Approve weekday offer language (avoid discount confusion on weekends).
decisionsNeeded.impactIfDelayed: Paid launch shifts by 48 hours; Week 1 micro-plan will miss its decision gate.

risks.description: Retargeting audience may be small → frequency increases → creative fatigue.
risks.mitigation: Set frequency watch thresholds; refresh creatives weekly; widen retargeting window if needed.

nextActions.action: Supervisor to log approval decision and schedule launch QA (tracking + UTMs).
Creative Pod to deliver 6 creative variants (proof-led + weekday hook) for testing matrix.
